description: Following a successful discovery phase, a consultant needs to draft an SOW for a standard implementation project.

nodes.task_description: Select the appropriate SOW template for a 'Standard Implementation'.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant chooses the correct template from the document library.

nodes.task_description: Fill in the SOW with the customer's details, project scope, timeline, and cost, based on the discovery document.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant creates a detailed and accurate SOW.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft SOW to the customer for review and signature.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant sends the SOW to the customer.
